description: This Kotlin source file defines the TokenStore class, which manages secure storage and retrieval of authentication tokens using EncryptedSharedPreferences with a fallback to regular SharedPreferences in case of encryption failure.

classes.name: TokenStore
classes.description: A class responsible for securely storing and retrieving authentication tokens using Android's encrypted shared preferences with a fallback mechanism.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Stores the provided TokenPair (access token, refresh token, and expiry time) into shared preferences.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Retrieves the TokenPair from shared preferences if available and valid.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all stored token data from shared preferences.
